acceptance_criteria.given: hooks/pre_slashcommand_validate.sh exists in the repo with mode 644
acceptance_criteria.when: dev applies chmod 755 (or git update-index --chmod=+x) to hooks/pre_slashcommand_validate.sh

acceptance_criteria.given: scripts/resolve-close-report.sh exists in the repo with mode 644
acceptance_criteria.when: dev applies chmod 755 (or git update-index --chmod=+x) to scripts/resolve-close-report.sh

acceptance_criteria.given: tests/test-lock-detection.sh creates TEST_REPO=/tmp/lock-test-repo-$$ at line 18 with no trap handler
acceptance_criteria.when: dev adds trap 'rm -rf "$TEST_REPO" 2>/dev/null' EXIT INT TERM immediately after the TEST_REPO= assignment line
acceptance_criteria.then: grep -nE 'trap.*EXIT INT TERM' tests/test-lock-detection.sh returns exactly 1 line containing TEST_REPO

check.command: grep -cE 'trap .*(TEST_REPO).*EXIT INT TERM|trap.*EXIT INT TERM.*(TEST_REPO)' tests/test-lock-detection.sh

acceptance_criteria.given: tests/verify-stop-spec-session-isolation.sh uses mktemp -d at line 10 with no trap handler
acceptance_criteria.when: dev adds trap 'rm -rf "$WORK" 2>/dev/null' EXIT INT TERM immediately after the WORK=$(mktemp ...) line
acceptance_criteria.then: grep -nE 'trap.*EXIT INT TERM' tests/verify-stop-spec-session-isolation.sh returns exactly 1 line containing WORK

acceptance_criteria.given: hooks/smart-checkpoint.sh lines 13-15 contain stale rm-attempt narrative ('dev subagent attempted to rm this file but the global bash-safety hook blocks rm. The user may delete it manually with:')
acceptance_criteria.when: dev removes or replaces those lines with no new stale narrative
acceptance_criteria.then: grep -c 'dev subagent attempted\|delete it manually with' hooks/smart-checkpoint.sh outputs 0

check.command: grep -c 'dev subagent attempted\|delete it manually with' hooks/smart-checkpoint.sh

acceptance_criteria.given: hooks/ensure-git-repo.sh lines 14-15 contain stale rm-attempt narrative
acceptance_criteria.when: dev removes or replaces those lines
acceptance_criteria.then: grep -c 'dev subagent attempted\|delete it manually with' hooks/ensure-git-repo.sh outputs 0

check.command: grep -c 'dev subagent attempted\|delete it manually with' hooks/ensure-git-repo.sh

acceptance_criteria.then: grep -cE 'simplified example|this is pseudocode|this is a placeholder|documentation for future implementation' hooks/pre_slashcommand_validate.sh outputs 0

check.command: grep -cE 'simplified example|this is pseudocode|this is a placeholder|documentation for future implementation' hooks/pre_slashcommand_validate.sh

acceptance_criteria.when: bash -n is run on each file
acceptance_criteria.then: Exit code = 0 for all 6 files (no syntax errors introduced)

check.command: for f in hooks/pre_slashcommand_validate.sh scripts/resolve-close-report.sh tests/test-lock-detection.sh tests/verify-stop-spec-session-isolation.sh hooks/smart-checkpoint.sh hooks/ensure-git-repo.sh; do bash -n $f || exit 1; done

non_goals: Renaming tests/ shell scripts to test_*.sh convention (non-zero blast radius)
Modifying hooks/lib/checkpoint-core.sh (644 is correct for sourced library)
Any logic changes to any script
